positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard/home page with their session active
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed with username and password fields visible
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is redirected away from the login page
Verify the dashboard or home page is displayed
Verify the authenticated user's name or email is visible in the UI (e.g., in a header or profile section)
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: URL changes to the authenticated route and the correct page title is displayed with no errors
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page URL is correct
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the URL has changed from the login page URL
Verify the new page title matches the expected post-login page title
Verify no error messages are displayed on the page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login and verification of page title/URL after redirect

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Validation error messages are displayed for both empty fields and the user remains on the login page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Leave the email/username field empty
Leave the password field empty
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed such as 'Email is required' or 'Username is required'
Verify no authentication or redirect occurs
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username and empty password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: An error message indicating invalid credentials is displayed and the user is not authenticated
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter 'WrongPassword123!' in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an error message is displayed such as 'Invalid credentials' or 'Incorrect username or password'
Verify the password field is cleared or remains filled but login is not granted
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid username but incorrect password
